wr-439961-1-0-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Seaf.questDescription: I got myself a pretty good ship. But Caribbean waters are too rough to sail without a few good cannons.

wr-439961-7-0-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Seaf.questDescription: I got myself a pretty good ship. But Caribbean waters are too rough to sail without a few good cannons.

wr-439961-10-1-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Isl.questDescription: After the pirate attack, the sea washed me ashore on a deserted island. If I want to stay alive, I’ll have to set up camp.

wr-439961-11-2-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Hun.questDescription: I came across an abandoned Buccaneers’ camp. Their notes suggest pirates attacked, forcing them to defend themselves and hide in the jungle.

wr-439961-11-3-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Hun.questDescription: I came across an abandoned Buccaneers’ camp. Their notes suggest pirates attacked, forcing them to defend themselves and hide in the jungle.

wr-439961-11-4-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Hun.questDescription: I came across an abandoned Buccaneers’ camp. Their notes suggest pirates attacked, forcing them to defend themselves and hide in the jungle.

wr-439961-11-5-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Res.questDescription: The pirates are holding plenty of sailors captive. If we free them, they might help us get off this island.

wr-439961-11-6-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_INe.questDescription: Even if this island looks like a little paradise, I won’t last long here. I need to get back to civilization.

wr-439961-11-7-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_INe.questDescription: Even if this island looks like a little paradise, I won’t last long here. I need to get back to civilization.

wr-439961-12-2-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Res.questDescription: The pirates are holding plenty of sailors captive. If we free them, they might help us get off this island.

wr-439961-12-3-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Res.questDescription: The pirates are holding plenty of sailors captive. If we free them, they might help us get off this island.

wr-439961-12-4-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Res.questDescription: The pirates are holding plenty of sailors captive. If we free them, they might help us get off this island.

wr-439961-13-1-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Rev.questDescription: Thomas Richards killed my crew, sank my ship, and threw me into the sea. Time to pay that bastard a visit and settle the score. While I’m at it, I’ll take the artifact back—if I’m lucky, it’ll lift this blight from my body.

wr-439961-13-1-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Abo.questDescription: Someone tipped the pirates off about my ship’s route. Doctor Galen is convinced that the traitor is among the Governor’s inner circle.

wr-439961-14-1-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Rev.questDescription: Thomas Richards killed my crew, sank my ship, and threw me into the sea. Time to pay that bastard a visit and settle the score. While I’m at it, I’ll take the artifact back—if I’m lucky, it’ll lift this blight from my body.

wr-439961-15-2-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Rev.questDescription: Thomas Richards killed my crew, sank my ship, and threw me into the sea. Time to pay that bastard a visit and settle the score. While I’m at it, I’ll take the artifact back—if I’m lucky, it’ll lift this blight from my body.

wr-439961-16-0-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Sea.questDescription: I got myself a pretty good ship. But Caribbean waters are too rough to sail without a few good cannons.

wr-439961-20-6-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_For.questDescription: It turns out the artifact is one of Charon’s Obols—relics of an ancient being who ferries souls to the realm of the dead. The traveler I rescued warned that this relic will soon turn me into one of the undead. To avoid such a grim fate, I’ll have to find the remaining Obols.

wr-439961-20-7-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Jok.questDescription: At the centre of the flooded platform stands an ancient stone altar. Carved into it is the beginning of a tale about the Itzeltek's priest and his daughter.

wr-439961-20-8-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Jok.questDescription: At the centre of the flooded platform stands an ancient stone altar. Carved into it is the beginning of a tale about the Itzeltek's priest and his daughter.

wr-439961-20-9-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Jok.questDescription: At the centre of the flooded platform stands an ancient stone altar. Carved into it is the beginning of a tale about the Itzeltek's priest and his daughter.

wr-439961-24-1-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Fea.questDescription: I came across pages from the journal of another man who, like me, was shipwrecked and struggled to survive.

wr-439961-24-2-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Fea.questDescription: I came across pages from the journal of another man who, like me, was shipwrecked and struggled to survive.

wr-439961-26-4-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Fai.questDescription: The Swamp Ruins hide countless secrets and treasures left behind by an ancient people. I can’t help but wonder what stories these walls hold.

wr-439961-26-5-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Fai.questDescription: The Swamp Ruins hide countless secrets and treasures left behind by an ancient people. I can’t help but wonder what stories these walls hold.

wr-439961-26-6-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Fai.questDescription: The Swamp Ruins hide countless secrets and treasures left behind by an ancient people. I can’t help but wonder what stories these walls hold.

wr-439961-29-0-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Sec.questDescription: As if the marks on my body weren’t enough, now I seem to be seeing ghosts talking about some kind of Spanish expedition.

wr-439961-30-1-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Sac.questDescription: Somebody tied a man to the ship’s wheel and left him to die a slow, agonizing death…

wr-439961-30-4-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Los.questDescription: The artifact that could save me has fallen into the hands of another of Blackbeard’s lackeys—Israel Hands. I’ll have to go looking for him in the Foothills.

wr-439961-30-5-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Los.questDescription: The artifact that could save me has fallen into the hands of another of Blackbeard’s lackeys—Israel Hands. I’ll have to go looking for him in the Foothills.

wr-439961-32-1-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Sac.questDescription: Somebody tied a man to the ship’s wheel and left him to die a slow, agonizing death…

wr-439961-33-1-quest-DA_QP_FactionQuest_.questDescription: Hard times came to Tortuga: the governor was killed, pirates seized control of the archipelago, and the town itself was overrun by the drowned, forcing the survivors to seek shelter elsewhere.

wr-439961-35-0-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Los.questDescription: The artifact that could save me has fallen into the hands of another of Blackbeard’s lackeys—Israel Hands. I’ll have to go looking for him in the Foothills.

wr-439961-36-1-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Los.questDescription: The artifact that could save me has fallen into the hands of another of Blackbeard’s lackeys—Israel Hands. I’ll have to go looking for him in the Foothills.

wr-439961-36-3-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Los.questDescription: The artifact that could save me has fallen into the hands of another of Blackbeard’s lackeys—Israel Hands. I’ll have to go looking for him in the Foothills.

wr-439961-36-4-quest-DA_QP_FactionQuest_.questDescription: Long Ben is worried his tavern will run out of wine. The smugglers are in trouble—too many people gone missing, and too many caches turning up empty.

wr-439961-37-1-quest-DA_QP_MainQuest_Rev.questDescription: Thomas Richards killed my crew, sank my ship, and threw me into the sea. Time to pay that bastard a visit and settle the score. While I’m at it, I’ll take the artifact back—if I’m lucky, it’ll lift this blight from my body.

wr-439961-37-3-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Sac.questDescription: Somebody tied a man to the ship’s wheel and left him to die a slow, agonizing death…

wr-439961-37-4-quest-DA_QP_SideQuest_Und.questDescription: I found a destroyed Smugglers hideout on the island. It seems like they’re in trouble, and someone is targeting them.

wr-439961-39-0-quest-DA_QP_FactionQuest_.questDescription: Edward Teach nearly destroyed the Brethren of the Coast during his assault on Tortuga. Their forces are scattered, and Stede Bonnet’s ships—another of Blackbeard’s lieutenants—are hunting down the survivors.

wr-439961-40-0-quest-DA_QP_FactionQuest_.questDescription: Edward Teach nearly destroyed the Brethren of the Coast during his assault on Tortuga. Their forces are scattered, and Stede Bonnet’s ships—another of Blackbeard’s lieutenants—are hunting down the survivors.
